problem.title: LOAM-Livox on the second public HDL-400 reference window
problem.question: How does LOAM-Livox perform on the second public HDL-400 reference window?

dataset.reference_role: public reference trajectory sliced from the HDL-400 pose trace export

variants.label: Fast
variants.intent: Use coarser map grids and fewer outer refinement passes for faster Livox-style LOAM updates.

variants.label: Dense
variants.intent: Use finer map grids and extra outer refinement passes for a more exhaustive LOAM solve.
